节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides the capability to access the data loss prevention (DLP) files.
Enumerates the types of actions that can be performed on a DLP file.
View a DLP file.
Save a DLP file.
Save a DLP file as another file.
Edit a DLP file.
Take a screenshot of a DLP file.
Share the screen, on which a DLP file is opened.
Record the screen, on which a DLP file is opened.
Copy in the editor, on which a DLP file is opened.
Print a DLP file.
Export a DLP file.
Change the permissions for a DLP file.
Enumerates the access permissions for a DLP file.
No permission.
Read-only.
Edit.
Full control.
Represents the permission info of a DLP file.
Access permission for the DLP file.
Actions allowed for the DLP file. The value is a combination of flags in {@link ActionFlagType}.
Represents the accessed DLP file info.
URI of the DLP file.
Time when the DLP file was last opened.
Represents the retention sandbox info.
Application index of the DLP sandbox.
Bundle name of the application.
List of file URIs.
Checks whether a file is a DLP file. This method uses a promise to return the result. 2. Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { number } fd - Indicates the file descriptor of the file to check.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Returns {@code true} if {@link fd} is a DLP file; returns {@code false} otherwise.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 19100011 - The system ability works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Indicates the file descriptor of the file to check.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if {@link fd} is a DLP file; returns {@code false} otherwise.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the original file name from a DLP file name. This method removes the DLP file name extension from the DLP file name.

@returns { string } Returns the original file name obtained.
@throws { BusinessError } 19100011 - The system ability works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Indicates the DLP file name.

节点.return_description: Returns the original file name obtained.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to the event reported when a DLP file is opened by current application. The value of type must be openDLPFile. 2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed. which is available only for non-DLP sandbox applications.
注释信息: @param { 'openDLPFile' } type - Indicates the type of the event to subscribe to.
@param { Callback<AccessedDLPFileInfo> } listener - Indicates the callback invoked when a DLP file is opened by current application.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 19100007 - No permission to call this API,
@throws { BusinessError } 19100011 - The system ability works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Indicates the type of the event to subscribe to.
Indicates the callback invoked when a DLP file is opened by current application.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
No permission to call this API,

节点.功能描述: Enumerates the account types for a DLP file.
Cloud account.

Authorized users of the DLP file.
Contact account of the DLP file.
Whether the DLP file can be accessed offline. If the DLP file supports offline access, the credential server needs to be connected to the network only when the DLP file is opened for the first time.
Everyone access list for the DLP file.
Timestamp of the time when the DLP file expires.
Defines the action to perform when the DLP file has expired.
Id of file.
Defines the number of times the DLP file can be opened.
Defines whether watermarking is required.
Defines the countdown for the DLP file can be opened.

节点.功能描述: Enumerates the action types when exceed expiry time.

OPEN, which allows DLP files to be opened exceed expiry time.
